_comment: Machine-readable readiness signal for Mission Control. Generated/updated by hand at significant milestones. Honest reporting — 'unknown' is preferred over invented values.
commitNote: HEAD before this prep session's uncommitted changes (working tree has 5 new files + 3 modified). Adrian has not yet approved a commit/push.

buildStatus.notes: Vite + esbuild, ~10s. SessionDetail chunk warning is pre-existing (>500kb). dist/index.js + dist/public/ produced clean.

testStatus.skippedNote: server/deepgram.test.ts is env-gated via it.skipIf(!process.env.DEEPGRAM_API_KEY). Passes when key is present.

safetyGuards: default is dry-run, --commit required for any DB write
reset only matches dealNumber LIKE 'T%-D%' — cannot touch real StoneEagle data
synthetic emails use RFC 2606 .test TLD — cannot collide with real domains
customer names from public name pool, not real customers

deepgramStatus.envVarSetInProd: yes (per docs/deployment-runbook.md §11.1; full reference in docs/deploy-manus-runbook.md §1.2)
deepgramStatus.fallbackBehavior: browser SpeechRecognition (Chrome / Edge) when key missing or Deepgram unreachable
blockers: must verify server-side transcription in browser before any live demo or install — see doc § 'Verification before any live demo'

retentionStatus.scriptStatus: dry-run + --commit modes implemented; tested via 15-test unit suite
retentionStatus.productionGuard: refused without ALLOW_PRODUCTION_DELETE=1 env (cron sets it; humans should not)
openItems: Manus cron not yet stood up — by May 15 per docs/data-retention-and-delete.md action plan
Reads during 30-day soft-delete window not gated — open legal question
owner/action table in deployment-runbook.md was added in this session — verify Adrian agrees with the named owners

deployStatus.missingEnvVarImpact: manager invite emails ship with hardcoded fallback URL until set
deployStatus.rollbackProcedure: Manus Management UI -> Version History -> Rollback (see docs/deployment-runbook.md §11.4; deeper detail in docs/deploy-manus-runbook.md §5)

blockers.description: APP_BASE_URL not set in Manus secrets
blockers.fix: set APP_BASE_URL=https://finico-pilot-mqskutaj.manus.space in Manus secrets, then click Publish

blockers.owner: Adrian + dealer counsel (Jim Koch / Paragon legal)

blockers.description: Working tree has uncommitted changes from this prep session
blockers.blocks: nothing — but a stale working tree means the readiness JSON's commit hash will diverge from any future deploy
blockers.fix: review the diff, commit + push when ready (Adrian has not approved auto-commit)

readinessLevelReasoning: Code, tests, build, and docs are ready for the May 1 Korum install. Production deploy is one env var away. Demo flow is verified by code and documented end-to-end. NOT 'production_ready' because: (a) APP_BASE_URL still unset in Manus, (b) DPA v1 not counsel-reviewed, (c) the deletion-cron is not yet stood up (first run not due until ~May 31, so this is not a Friday blocker).
